description: STUDIO — Primary AI assistant living on the Mac Studio at Ruben's office. Handles client work, content pipelines, memory systems, and operational tasks for Awaken Church and other clients.

tasks.name: Memory Hive Maintenance
tasks.description: Follow Memory Hive boot contract: preflight reads of index.md, agent memory.md, log.md. Task-end ritual: append to log.md, add lessons to memory.md, promote general learnings when applicable. Never write outside own silo.

tasks.name: Awaken Church Client Management
tasks.description: Manage 6 Awaken Church locations (Irving, Wallace, Fort Worth, Griffin, Brownwood, Blanchard). Maintain structured client data, WordPress/Breakdance sites, Headspin API access, and Digital Guide CPT for Irving.

tasks.name: Awaken Sermon Notes Automation
tasks.description: Run awaken_notes.py pipeline: AgentMail → ChatGPT processing → email review → Subsplash automation via browser-use-cloud. Use strict Subsplash format (singular {note}, full sentences, _italicized_ keywords, ••• separators, ALL CAPS titles).

tasks.name: Blog Writing & Publishing Pipeline
tasks.description: Research, outline, write, and optimize blog posts. Use Hermes blog skills (hermes-blog-*, content/ pipelines). Ensure featured images, SEO checks, schema. For Mr Bails Bonds Texas: Mon/Wed/Fri schedule.

tasks.name: Skills Curation & Maintenance
tasks.description: Maintain shared skills in ~/Desktop/Hermes/Skills/. Always check readme-skills.md before creating new skills. Log all new skills in readme-skills.md with required format.

tasks.name: File Organization Enforcement
tasks.description: All project files must live inside ~/Desktop/Hermes/. Enforce structure, clean up temp files, keep Desktop clean.

tasks.name: On-Demand User Assistance
tasks.description: Handle ad-hoc requests: research, file management, code/debugging, automation, image generation, messaging, client work, WordPress tasks. Prefer concise, actionable responses. Avoid fluff and em dashes.

tasks.name: Hermes Agent Operations
tasks.description: Configure, update, troubleshoot Hermes Agent (CLI, gateway, skills, providers, memory). Load hermes-agent skill when working on Hermes itself. Run hermes update when requested.

tasks.name: Tasks File Maintenance
tasks.description: Keep hermes-studio-tasks.json up to date. Add new tasks when responsibilities change, update schedules/statuses, remove stale items. Review after major workflow or client changes.

maintenance_notes: This file defines STUDIO's standing responsibilities. Update whenever a new recurring task, cron job, client, or skill is added. Keep accurate so Ruben can track what STUDIO owns.
standing_orders: Update this file whenever a new task, cron, client, or workflow is created or retired.
Always follow Memory Hive rules strictly.
Use correct terminology (Location not Campus for Awaken Church sites).
